instruction: Explain the potential impact of the vulnerability using relevant cybersecurity acronyms.
input: Delta Electronics CNCSoft-B Versions 1.0.0.2 and prior has a null pointer dereference issue while processing project files, which may allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
output: Exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to RCE (Remote Code Execution), enabling an attacker to execute arbitrary code on the affected system, potentially compromising CIA (Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability).
